description_long: This apartment building features a boxy, modern design with clean lines and a flat roof. The facade is punctuated by a series of rectangular windows arranged in a symmetrical pattern, and the main entrance is accessed via a set of wide steps leading to double doors. On one side, there is a large garage with a roll-up door and a driveway ramp, suggesting provisions for vehicle access. The building appears to have two stories, with the upper floor set back slightly from the lower, creating a subtle tiered effect. The exterior is finished in a uniform light color, giving it a minimalist and contemporary appearance. There are no visible balconies or decorative elements, emphasizing functionality and simplicity.
description: A modern, two-story apartment building with a flat roof, symmetrical windows, and a large garage. The exterior is minimalist and light-colored, with a prominent main entrance and no balconies.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with steps, symmetrical windows, and the large garage with a ramp on the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage section with two small windows and the garage door ramp.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain facade with several windows and a secondary entrance with steps.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a simple arrangement of windows and a secondary set of steps.
attribute_window_arrangement: The windows are arranged in a regular, symmetrical grid pattern across the facade, with even spacing and alignment both vertically and horizontally.
